task_description: Implement an AI-powered recommendation feature that suggests songs and artists with similar genres, moods, or musical characteristics. The system analyzes the selected song's metadata and provides a curated list of similar tracks from different artists to help users discover new music.

verification.summary: Build compiles and type-checks successfully. Lint passes with no errors. No test framework installed in this project so test_quality is skipped. Semantic review v2 approved the implementation.
